incidents.event: Indian-flagged livestock vessel sank off the coast of Oman after being targeted by a suspected drone or missile strike; all Indian crew were rescued by Omani authorities.

US military sank Iranian military boats after Iranian forces fired cruise missiles, drones, and small boats at US Navy ships in the Strait of Hormuz; US Navy began escorting commercial ships through the strait.
Iranian forces hijacked a floating armoury ship off the coast of Fujairah, UAE, and diverted it toward Iranian territorial waters; vessel suspected to carry weapons for regional proxies.
Bulk carrier hit by two unidentified projectiles causing fire onboard near the coast of Oman in the Arabian Sea; crew safe and fire extinguished with assistance from Pakistan Navy.
Tanker TALARA seized by suspected Iranian forces 20 nautical miles east of Khor Fakkan, UAE, and directed toward Iranian territorial waters.
Container vessel hit by an unknown projectile in the Strait of Hormuz, causing fire; crew safe and well; incident under investigation.
